projects.name: EFL Match Prep Tool
projects.description: Broadcast match preparation tool for EFL and World Cup coverage

tasks.title: Player and manager headshots scraper (Step 4)
tasks.notes: Clubcast clubs: plain HTTP fetch. Gamechanger clubs: Playwright. WC nations via Wikidata.

tasks.title: Local image + data store with upload UI (Step 5)
tasks.notes: Manual fallback for failed scrapes. Needs simple local Node/Express server for file writes. Build after Steps 1–4.

tasks.title: Kit image source — Football Kit Archive workaround (Step 6)
tasks.notes: FKA blocks automated requests (403). Options: direct CDN URL harvesting via browser, Footy Headlines, or manual upload via Step 5 store.

tasks.title: Deeper stats — home/away form splits, goals by time period, set piece stats (Step 7)
tasks.notes: No viable free fetchable source found yet. FBref and Wikipedia both blocked. Needs further research.

tasks.title: Manager name
tasks.notes: TheSportsDB free tier does not return coach data — coach field is always null. Needs paid tier or alternative source.

tasks.title: Referee data and card tendency stats
tasks.notes: Not yet scoped — no source identified.

tasks.title: Multi-device data sync
tasks.notes: Currently localStorage only. Requires backend or sync service.

tasks.title: GitHub Pages deployment config
tasks.notes: Add deployment config and update live site URL in README.

tasks.title: L1/L2 API access via football-data.org Tier 2
tasks.notes: €49/month — awaiting bespoke pricing response. No code changes needed beyond key upgrade.

projects.name: UKFL Dynasty Hub
projects.description: 12-team Superflex dynasty fantasy football hub — draft analyser + in-season hub

tasks.title: Historical rookie draft pages
tasks.notes: One HTML file per past draft (draft-2025.html, draft-2024.html etc.) with static PICKS snapshot. Hub homepage updated to list all years.

tasks.title: Records & awards page
tasks.notes: Static records.html — past champions, season MVPs, UKFL awards, notable records. Data in records-data.js.

tasks.title: Trade database (needs Supabase)
tasks.notes: Store all Sleeper league transactions with pick resolution. Supabase table: trades.

tasks.title: Value over time / snapshots (needs Supabase)
tasks.notes: Save roster value at draft time + periodically. Show change over time with grades. Supabase table: snapshots.

tasks.title: Notes/commentary per pick or owner (needs Supabase)
Matchups tab
tasks.notes: Marked as coming soon in season.html tab list.
